content.full_text:
May 22, 1991

Lynda Cassady  
Political Reform Consultant  
California Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Ms. Cassady:

I would very much appreciate receiving answers to the following questions concerning the Political Reform Act of 1974:

1. When a person subject to the provisions of the Political Reform Act of 1974 used "frequent flier" credits earned from official travel to obtain free airline tickets, must that person report the value of the free airline tickets?

2. When a person subject to the provisions of the Political Reform Act of 1974 used "frequent flier" credits earned from travel paid from campaign contributions to obtain free airline tickets, must that person report the value of the free airline tickets?

Your anticipated courtesy and cooperation in this matter is appreciated.

Very truly yours,

GARY R. ODOM  
Attorney at Law
